Extra Material

Xuesong Wang

27 June, 2026

Source: vignettes/extra_material.Rmd
extra_material.Rmd

Overview

The Extra material tab provides a space for custom tables or plots bundled alongside your single-cell data. Common use cases include:

  • Cell type annotation results (e.g., SingleR scores)
  • Custom QC summary tables
  • Publication-ready figures
  • Any additional analysis you want to share with collaborators

The tab appears conditionally — only when the .crb file contains extra material. You control what appears, so the interface stays clean when no extra content is needed.

Quick start 

library(cerebroAppLite)
launchCerebroV1.4()
  1. Launch cerebroAppLite and load a .crb file with extra material
  2. If extra material is present, Extra material appears in the sidebar
  3. Select a category (tables or plots)
  4. Choose a specific table or plot to view

Content categories

Tables: any data.frame. Rendered as interactive DT tables with search, sort, and download.

Plots: any ggplot2 object. Displayed at original resolution with download support.

Embedding content

Use the extra_material parameter in exportFromSeurat():

exportFromSeurat(seurat_object,
  file = "my_data.crb",
  extra_material = list(
    tables = list(SingleR_results = annotation_df),
    plots  = list(umap_overview = umap_plot)
  )
)

See also

vignette("export_and_visualize_custom_tables_and_plots") for a detailed walkthrough with examples.

On this page

Developed by Michael Heming, Roman Hillje, Xuesong Wang.
